description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and defines an IMAGE_NAME variable pointing to registry.gitlab.com/deepset-ai/open-source/word2vec-embeddings-de. Add a single stage called build and a job named "build docker" that runs only on the master branch. In the before_script log in to the GitLab Container Registry with docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com. In the script build the Docker image with docker build -t $IMAGE_NAME . and push it with docker push $IMAGE_NAME.
